result.stdout:
Description:
  IBoundary

Usage:
  SrtsNetLayer.Generator [options]

Options:
  --output <output>                                The name of the output from the conversion.
  --input <input>                                  The file to analyze []
  --casing <DotNetPascalCase|JavascriptCamelCase>  Casing of Properties and Fields. Defaults to [default: JavascriptCamelCase]
  --prefix-types <prefix-types>                    How should type definition be prefixed. Defaults to 'T' [default: T]
  --mapping-file <mapping-file>                    File to load custom mappings from []
  --no-header                                      Disable generated file header [default: False]
  --version                                        Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                   Show help and usage information
